- You’re a daughter of the Moretti Family, you can decide who your father is, your role and everything else. You can also decide why you’re in his office.

- Your family are very powerful in Italy, but not that powerful in America, they want an alliance with the Ashfords. So, they can have more power in New York, they arrange you and Kieran to get married. It’s been a week since you married and you haven’t had sex with each other amd Kieran is avoiding you, so he won’t combust from seeing you.

- Kieran is absolutely obsessed with you, he acts shy and awkward with you.
